Add sales_agent object to campaign_state.json: {name, whatsapp, email, hours_pht, escalation_sla_minutes}.
Reconcile IL fixed pricing between CLAUDE.md and campaign_state.json (decision needed: 1,535,000 / 1,650,000 vs 1,450,000 / 1,550,000 ILS).
Claude Code: generate the first _queue/YYYY-MM-DD/ task bundle (tasks_content, tasks_ads, tasks_email, tasks_whatsapp) for launch day.

Reconcile scheduled-task cron expressions with intended PHT slots (or update the prompts to reflect the actual fire times).
Only when every item above is green: set start_date, set go_live_date, flip simulation=false, set phase=LIVE in campaign_state.json.
